env_files.role: Main long-form brochure/prospectus-style brief with final public facts, draft notes, internal remarks, status tags, and distractors
env_files.license_note: Uses the repository's cached public benchmark asset; no web access is needed by the agent.
env_files.conversion_note: The standalone image file is not exposed as an env file. The PDF intentionally distributes final facts among draft notes, FAQ, module descriptions, and internal remarks.
env_files.reproducibility_note: Generated locally with ReportLab from benchmark-authored text and cached benchmark public assets.
env_files.adaptation_note: Benchmark-authored museum exhibit guide/archive note PDF; synthetic, not downloaded.
env_files.text_extract_check: Text layer is generated with ReportLab and validated by pypdf extraction.

env_files.role: Short supporting note that clarifies responsibility or context without listing all poster answers
env_files.reproducibility_note: Generated as part of the document_brief_002_005 rebuild.

source_policy.web_usage_note: Follow web_policy. Closed-env cases should be solved from cached env files only.

notes: Benchmark-authored museum exhibit guide/archive note PDF; synthetic, not downloaded. It avoids benchmark labels in the agent-visible PDF while preserving distractors and final facts in natural document language.
